content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; manifest-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' blob: https://api.mytonwallet.org wss://api.mytonwallet.org https://api.mytonwallet.org/proxy/ https://static.mytonwallet.org https://toncenter.mytonwallet.org wss://toncenter.mytonwallet.org https://toncenter-testnet.mytonwallet.org wss://toncenter-testnet.mytonwallet.org https://tonapiio.mytonwallet.org https://tonapiio-testnet.mytonwallet.org https://tronapi.mytonwallet.org https://api.shasta.trongrid.io https://ipfs.io/ipfs/ https://tonconnectbridge.mytonwallet.org/bridge/ ; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' ; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com/; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: https://static.mytonwallet.org https://imgproxy.mytonwallet.org https://dns-image.mytonwallet.org https://mytonwallet.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com https://cache.tonapi.io https://c.tonapi.io https://imgproxy.toncenter.com https://web-api.changelly.com; media-src 'self' data: https://static.mytonwallet.org/; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com/; form-action 'none'; frame-src 'self' https: ;
